message:
🌱 Add longhorn: [IMPROVEMENT] Remove or Change Helm pre-upgrade hook to mission (#1251)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "longhorn-6415-improvement-remove-or-change-helm-pre-upgrade-hook-to-support-argo",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "longhorn: [IMPROVEMENT] Remove or Change Helm pre-upgrade hook to support ArgoCD",
+    "description": "[IMPROVEMENT] Remove or Change Helm pre-upgrade hook to support ArgoCD. This issue affects 16+ users.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify longhorn upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your longhorn deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn -n longhorn --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review longhorn configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant longhorn configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn\nkubectl get configmap -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=longhorn\n```\nAs of now, longhorn stopped working with ArgoCD, due to ArgoCD implementing helms post-upgrade hooks as `PreSync` (and they have no plans to change this, since they believe Helm charts should not use any pre/post upgrade hooks), causing it to run"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [IMPROVEMENT] Remove or Change Helm pre-upgrade hook to…",
+        "description": "The pre-upgrade hook is only for the helm to prevent any invalid upgrade after upgrading the Longhorn setup to the new version, so it can ensure the current setup with the old version is intact if the upgrade hook failed. \n\nIf using kubectl apply to do the upgrade, the same behavior will be tackled\n```yaml\nhelmPreUpgradeCheckerJob:\n  enabled: false\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade longhorn to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade longhorn:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade longhorn longhorn/longhorn --namespace longhorn\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n longhorn\nhelm list -n longhorn\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [IMPROVEMENT] Remove or Change Helm pre-upgrade… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn -n longhorn --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n longhorn --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The pre-upgrade hook is only for the helm to prevent any invalid upgrade after upgrading the Longhorn setup to the new version, so it can ensure the current setup with the old version is intact if the upgrade hook failed.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "helmPreUpgradeCheckerJob:\n  enabled: false"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "longhorn",
+      "incubating",
+      "storage",
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "longhorn"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Job",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/issues/6415",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn"
+    },
+    "reactions": 16,
+    "comments": 22,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with longhorn installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-16T06:44:04.147Z",

+}
